Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure

revision.text:

revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1788_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Commonscat|1788 in Japan}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 7 | d = 8 | y = 8 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1788年の各国 }} {{Commons category|1788 in Japan}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:1788年の日本}} {{translated page|ja|Category:1788年の日本|version=54163013}} {{wikidata link|Q15090131}} <!--interwikis--> [[azb:Category:۱۷۸۸-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[co:commons:Category:1788 in Japan]] [[ja:Category:1788年の日本]] [[ko:Category:1788년 일본]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tenmei Fire]] [[Category:1780s in Japan]] [[Category:1788 by country]] [[Category:1788 in Asia]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:Years in Japan]]
